details.test: Task 1: Book new teen acne visit after 3 PM within next 14 days
Task 2: Request consultation for cheaper 60-minute cosmetic treatment under $250
Task 3: Save psoriasis information to My Care Plan
Task 4: Check coverage and cost estimate for skin cancer screening with HealthSure Silver HMO
Task 5: Find nearest Saturday-open clinic within 15 miles of 94105 and view driving directions
Task 6: Save pediatric dermatologist and eczema resource for child under 10 to favorites
Task 7: Subscribe to monthly cosmetic dermatology offers newsletter
Task 8: Use symptom checker for itchy red rash on arms and open 'When to see a doctor'
Task 9: Create and preview a pre-visit checklist for a mole removal procedure
